_comment: Machine-readable manifest of every {{TOKEN}} in this template. Drives init.sh. 'optional: true' tokens belong to an integration the project may not have; during INIT you either keep+fill them (and add the setup) or delete the section that uses them. See INIT.md.

tokens.name: PACKAGE_MANAGER
tokens.description: Package manager binary (single binary; hooks call `command -v` on it)

tokens.name: FORMATTER
tokens.description: Formatter. If the project has no dedicated formatter, set this to the linter's autofix (e.g. "ESLint (eslint --fix)") and see INIT Step 3.

tokens.name: SOURCE_DIR
tokens.description: Main source dir (no trailing slash — templates append the / themselves)

tokens.name: TEST_DIR
tokens.description: Test root dir, or 'none' (no trailing slash — templates append the / themselves)

tokens.name: BUILD_CMD
tokens.description: Production build (drop if no build step)

tokens.name: FORMAT_CMD
tokens.description: Run formatter (or the linter's autofix if no dedicated formatter)

tokens.name: TYPECHECK_CMD
tokens.description: Type-check (drop if the language is untyped)

tokens.name: CODE_FILE_GLOB
tokens.description: Shell case-pattern of formatted extensions (format.sh). Contains shell metacharacters — use init.sh (literal substitution), not a sed sweep.

tokens.name: CODE_FILE_REGEX
tokens.description: Extended-regex of source extensions (check.sh). Contains regex metacharacters — use init.sh (literal substitution), not a sed sweep.
